title: Hagar hf.: Fjárfestakynning vegna stjórnendauppgjörs 2025/26 og uppgjörs 4. ársfjórðungs
description: Meðfylgjandi er fjárfestakynning Haga á stjórnendauppgjöri ársins 2025/26 og uppgjöri 4. ársfjórðungs sem haldin verður fyrir markaðsaðila og hluthafa kl. 8:30 í dag, föstudaginn 17. apríl 2026, á Nauthól, Nauthólsvegi 106 í Reykjavík. Á fundinum munu Finnur Oddsson, forstjóri, og Guðrún Eva Gunnarsdóttir, framkvæmdastjóri fjármálasviðs, kynna rekstur og afkomu félagsins ásamt því að svara fyrirspurnum.

title: Commencement of construction of stage II of the Seileri Kvartal development in Pärnu
description: Nordecon AS has commenced the implementation of the next stage of the Seileri Kvartal residential development project in Pärnu. As part of the second stage, two four- to five-storey apartment buildings will be constructed at Rääma 7c/1 and Rääma 7c/2, comprising a total of 25 apartments and 4 commercial units to be completed by spring 2027.

title: Seileri Kvartali arenduse II etapi ehitustööde algus Pärnus
description: Nordecon AS alustab Pärnus Seileri Kvartali elamuarendusprojekti järgmise etapi elluviimist. Teise etapiga rajatakse aadressidele Rääma 7c/1 ja Rääma 7c/2 kaks nelja- kuni viiekorruselist korterelamut, kuhu valmib 2027. aasta kevadeks kokku 25 korterit ning 4 äripinda.

title: Global Power Solutions Corp. Submits Expression of Interest for 15 MW Waste-to-Energy Project in Democratic Republic of Congo
description: Vancouver, BC, Canada, April 17, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Global Power Solutions Corp. (TSX Venture Exchange: PWER; Frankfurt Stock Exchanges: NJA) (“Global Power” or the “Company”) is pleased to announce that it has submitted an Expression of Interest (“EOI”) for the potential development and operation of a 15 megawatt (MW) waste-to-energy plant in Kinshasa, Democratic Republic of Congo (“DRC”).

title: Solar A/S: No. 10 2026 Major shareholder announcement
description: Pursuant to section 30 of the Danish Capital Markets Act, Solar A/S hereby announces that UBS Group AG has informed Solar that following its sale of shares on 14 April 2026, UBS Group AG’s holding of Solar B shares now totals 375,436 shares at DKK 100, corresponding to an ownership share of 4.69%.

title: Solar A/S: Nr. 10 2026 Storaktionærmeddelelse
description: I henhold til Lov om kapitalmarkeder § 30 skal Solar A/S hermed meddele, at UBS Group AG har meddelt Solar, at efter salg af aktier den 14. april 2026 har UBS Group AG en beholdning på 375.436 stk. B-aktier á DKK 100 i Solar, svarende til en ejerandel på 4,69%.

title: 曹操出行：資產管理將決定自動駕駛競賽，目標是 2030 年前達到 10 萬輛無人車
description: 中國杭州, April 17, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- 中國機械人的士行業競爭日益激烈，由 Geely Holding 支持的電召車平台曹操出行 (CaoCao) (02643.HK) 正致力成為頂尖的業界營運商。 在近日一次獨家專訪中，公司行政總裁 Gong Xin 表示，曹操出行計劃於 2030 年之前部署 100,000 輛自動駕駛汽車，並透過對車輛、技術及營運的端到端控制來提高營運效率。
